questions.q: According to a newly published study, when autistic users disclose their diagnosis to AI chatbots, the systems frequently advise them to avoid what? [1.1]
A new analysis reveals that published research in the social sciences has shown a persistent and growing political tilt in which direction over the last six decades?
A recent Japanese study drawing parallels between the current geopolitical environment and the 1930s found that international economic and political shocks can drive elites to align with what?
Researchers recently demonstrated with a microscopic model of human nerves and muscles that symptoms of Alzheimer's disease may actually begin where?
A new study tracking terminally ill patients revealed that as we approach death, our dreams commonly become more emotional, symbolic, and often feature reunions with whom?
